items.name_en: Top-tier Original【Exclusive Photo M45353 Black】Louis Vuitton launched the new Odeon small handbag for the 2020 Fall/Winter season, blending elegant style with practical function. The Monogram canvas features a zipper design for ample interior space, while the leather nameplate and reinforced leather corners continue the brand's heritage. The adjustable leather shoulder strap offers a comfortable shoulder or crossbody carry. 22 x 8 x 24 cm (Height x Width x Length)

items.name_en: Top-tier Original【Exclusive Photo M46933 Monogram】The Scott bag is crafted from Monogram canvas, reinterpreting the classic Scott cylindrical case with a modern touch. items.name_en: Top-tier Original【Exclusive Real Shot m82560 Blue】
items.name_cn:
Top-tier Original【Exclusive Real Shot m82560 Blue】
This pocket wallet is crafted from full-grain Taurillon leather, subtly embossed with LV letters and Monogram flowers. The exquisite structure includes an inner pocket, while the outer pocket is convenient for credit cards or transit cards.
Dimensions: 7.5 x 11.1 x 1 cm (Length x Height x Width)
